        this.detect = function(px, callback) {
            var detected = false;
            var checksRemain = 2;
            var error1 = false;
            var error2 = false;
            if (typeof callback != "function") return;
            px += "?ch=*&rn=*";

            function beforeCheck(callback, timeout) {
                if (checksRemain == 0 || timeout > 1E3) callback(checksRemain == 0 && detected);
                else setTimeout(function() {
                    beforeCheck(callback, timeout * 2)
                }, timeout * 2)
            }

            function checkImages() {
                if (--checksRemain) return;
                detected = !error1 && error2
            }
            var random = Math.random() * 11;
            var img1 = new Image;
            img1.onload = checkImages;
            img1.onerror = function() {
                error1 = true;
                checkImages()
            };
            img1.src = px.replace(/\*/, 1).replace(/\*/, random);
            var img2 = new Image;
            img2.onload = checkImages;
            img2.onerror = function() {
                error2 = true;
                checkImages()
            };
            img2.src = px.replace(/\*/, 2).replace(/\*/, random);
            beforeCheck(callback, 250)
        }
    };</script><!--noindex-->

    <div class="se-top-materials">
        <div class="se-top-materials__left">
        <div class="se-top-materials-news" data-component="top-materials-news">
    <div class="se-top-materials-news__header">
        <a href="/news/?isEditorialChoice=1" class="se-top-materials-news__title">Главные новости</a>

                <a href="https://www.sport-express.ru/olympics/winter/hockey/reviews/kanada-chehiya-na-olimpiade-2026-na-ldu-nahodilos-odnovremenno-shest-polevyh-igrokov-vo-vremya-matcha-1-4-finala-18-fevralya-podrobnosti-skandala-2400297/"  >Судейский скандал.         </div>
    </div>
</article>
                        </div>
